title: oryzopsis holciformis var. glabra
intro: Oryzopsis holciformis var. glabra, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that is native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oryzopsis holciformis var. glabra include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
